session.user: Change to repository root /home/runner/work/erk/erk and execute: make fast-ci. Report the full output and exit code.
session.assistant: I'll execute the `make fast-ci` command from the repository root.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci make target for testing suite

session.assistant:
make fast-ci passed: All checks successful
**Summary:** - **Lint**: All checks passed - **Format Check**: 1739 files already formatted - **Prettier Check**: All matched files properly formatted - **Markdown Check**: OK - **Exec Reference Check**: .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date - **ty**: All type checks passed - **Unit Tests (erk)**: 5920 passed in 14.33s - **Tests (erk-dev)**: 138 passed in 5.22s - **Tests (erk-statusline)**: 123 passed in 0.79s - **Tests (erk-mcp)**: All passed with AGENTS.md standard validation
**Exit Code**: 0 (success)
